title: Little Jesus
overview: Jean, a father recently separated, is facing a lot of difficulties. But his life may will change because he thinks his 10 years old son Loulou, do wonders. With a bit of luck... he could be a new messiah ! Jean has just to convince everybody else.

trailers.title: PETIT JESUS Bande Annonce (2023) Gérard Darmon, Antoine Bertrand, Comédie Française
